expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: cross-section interaction audit catches template x pause-mode and prompt-editor-open states
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly covers both required interaction/state focuses: (1) “Template × pause-mode interaction was missed...” citing BCIN-7730 and describing it as something Phase 5a cross-section interaction audit should catch; and (2) “Prompt-editor-open state was missed...” citing BCIN-7708/7709 and relating them to missing cross-section interaction/state coverage. It also states the benchmark focus verbatim: “Focus: Cross-section interaction audit catches template × pause-mode and prompt-editor-open states.”

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase5a
expectations.evidence: result.md is framed as a Phase 5a checkpoint enforcement evaluation throughout: title “Phase 5a Checkpoint Enforcement...”; metadata “Primary phase under test: phase5a”; contract reference “Per skill_snapshot/references/review-rubric-phase5a.md, Phase 5a must produce review notes that include ## Cross-Section Interaction Audit...”; and it includes an explicit verdict line “Output aligns with primary phase phase5a — PASS (assessment framing).”
